channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What it means to be an AI-augmented leader
item.description: Rasmus Hougaard is the founder and managing partner of Potential Project. In 2019 he was nominated by Thinkers50 as one of the eight most important leadership thinkers in the world.
item.dc:creator: Next Big Idea Club, Fast Company

item.title: DHS employees consider workforce transition amid major uncertainty
item.description: Staff across DHS, including at CISA and FEMA, are considering deferred resignation or other offers amid reports that their agencies will be targeted for cuts. The post DHS employees consider workforce transition amid major uncertainty first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Vendors vote to radically slash website certificate duration
item.description: In a move that will likely force IT to much more aggressively use web certificate automation services, the Certification Authority Browser Forum (CA/Browser Forum), a gathering of certificate issuers and suppliers of applications that use certificates, voted Friday to radically slash the lifespan of
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: SSA Shifts to Social Platform X for Announcements
item.description: The Social Security Administration (SSA) is switching to social platform X for announcements, citing dwindling communications staff and the need for a new communication mechanism.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Apple flew 600 tons of iPhones from India to the US to avoid Trump tariffs
item.description: Apple chartered six planes to fly 600 tons of iPhones into the US from India to avoid President Donald J. Trump’s tariffs, Reuters reports. That’s an estimated equivalent of up to 1.5 million smartphones.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Venmo’s dubious defaults look like a permanent privacy foul
item.description: If it weren’t for Signal, Venmo might be the most infamous app of the Trump administration—and maybe the most beloved among journalists covering this White House.
item.dc:creator: Rob Pegoraro, Fast Company

item.title: Musk 'most unlikeable person' in US: House Democrat
item.description: Rep. Robert Garcia (D-Calif.) called Elon Musk the “most unlikeable person” in the U.S. during a Thursday speech in support of his party’s push to oust the tech giant from his White House role by May 30.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Felonious Theranos Founder Elizabeth Holmes Launches Appeal of Conviction and Sentence
item.description: Felonious Theranos founder Elizabeth Holmes has launched another appeal of her conviction and sentence, claiming that a three-judge panel made mistakes in hearing her case.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Colombia's capital ends drought-related water rationing. Its case is a warning to other cities
item.description: Colombia’s capital has always seemed immune to water scarcity, nestled among cloud-kissed Andean peaks and known for steady rainfall.
item.dc:creator: Astrid Suarez And Steven Grattan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tech industry fledgling signs big South Bay office lease in expansion
item.description: A fledgling tech company that uses AI techniques to help big automakers produce self-driving vehicles is expanding into a big Sunnyvale office space.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: OnePlus Watch 3 gets surprise price hike in the US – and you can already guess why
item.description: The OnePlus Watch 3 now costs $499.99 in the US following the introduction of major tariffs on Chinese imports.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Two tempting budget Bluetooth turntables just landed in the UK, in time for Record Store Day 2025
item.description: Majority launches two vinyl players for Record Store Day and every other day, and you can choose with or without speakers
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple TV+ Unveils Mid-2025 Highlights: Exciting New Shows and Notable Omissions
item.description: Apple TV+ has announced its mid-2025 highlights, including exciting new shows like 'Slow Horses Season 5', 'Murderbot', and 'Echo Valley'. However, notable omissions include the next seasons of 'For All Mankind' and 'Foundation'.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Netflix’s next Jane Austen series is shaping up to be a better adaptation than Persuasion after landing Emma Corrin, Olivia Coleman and Jack Lowden
item.description: "Better than Persuasion" may be a low bar, but we're optimistic about Netflix's latest Jane Austen adaptation.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Defining leadership through mentorship and a strong network
item.description: Andrea Schulze understands the importance of mentorship when it comes to fostering more gender diversity in the tech industry, especially up to the leadership level.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google's new Android update will give your devices a battery boost – plus a helpful new feature for Google Wallet
item.description: There's a new update to Google Play services heading to devices, and we should see some tangible benefits.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The problem with Google’s Pixel 9a
item.description: Let’s get one thing out of the way first: Google’s Pixel 9a is one heck of a device. I’ve had the latest Pixel gizmo in my man-claws for a couple o’ weeks now, thanks to a loaner review unit provided by Google.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Morocco’s social security database hacked and leaked on Telegram
item.description: Morocco‘s social security agency said troves of data were stolen from its systems in a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the messaging app Telegram.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump
item.description: GOP lawmakers are focused on harmonizing key cyber regulations, including CISA’s proposed incident reporting rule and HHS’ new cyber update to HIPAA. The post Three key federal cyber regulations to watch under Trump first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: A quick win for DOGE? Make procurement competitive again
item.description: If DOGE is looking for a high-value, high-return target, the software procurement process is an easy win. The post A quick win for DOGE? Make procurement competitive again first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: OMB expands on best ways agencies should buy AI
item.description: OMB’s new acquisition memo to buy AI details only four deadlines for agencies over the next year, but outlines a host of new concepts to follow. The post OMB expands on best ways agencies should buy AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Hackers breach Morocco's social security database in an unprecedented cyberattack
item.description: Morocco’s social security agency says troves of data were stolen from its systems during a cyberattack this week that resulted in personal information being leaked on the Telegram messaging app.
item.dc:creator: Sam Metz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple has few incentives to start making iPhones in US, despite Trump's trade war with China
item.description: President Donald Trump’s administration has been predicting its barrage of tariffs targeting China will push Apple into manufacturing the iPhone in the U.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenAI countersues Elon Musk in legal dispute over ChatGPT maker's business ambitions
item.description: OpenAI is suing Elon Musk for unfair competition and interfering with its business relationships with investors and customers, escalating a legal battle between the ChatGPT maker and the billionaire who helped bankroll the artificial intelligence startup a decade ago.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: April update has broken Windows Hello for some devices but there’s a quick fix
item.description: A software hiccup has occurred with Windows Hello following this month’s security updates, one that could prevent users from logging in via facial recognition.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump SEC chair pick Paul Atkins confirmed by Senate
item.description: The Senate confirmed Paul Atkins as the next Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) leader. Atkins, a former Republican SEC commissioner, was greenlighted by the Senate in a 52-44 vote Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft says it's 'slowing or pausing' some AI data center projects, including $1B plan for Ohio
item.description: Microsoft said it is “slowing or pausing” some of its data center construction, including a $1 billion project in Ohio, the latest sign that the demand for artificial intelligence technology that drove a massive infrastructure expansion might not need quite as many powerful computers as expected.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: IETF hatching a new way to tame aggressive AI website scraping
item.description: For web publishers, stopping AI bots from scraping their best content while consuming valuable bandwidth must feel somewhere between futile and nigh impossible. It’s like throwing a cup of water at a forest fire.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scientists genetically engineer wolves with white hair and muscular jaws like the extinct dire wolf
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are trotting, sleeping and howling in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S., according to the company that aims to bring back lost species.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA LARSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump’s AI policy shifts focus to ‘high impact’ use cases
item.description: The White House says a new federal AI policy rejects the Biden administration's “risk-averse” approach, but one former official sees it as a “smart evolution." The post Trump’s AI policy shifts focus to ‘high impact’ use cases first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: World’s first AI-powered industrial super-humanoid robot
item.description: Mech the super-humanoid robot can lift up to 132 pounds and is designed to tackle stressful and repetitive tasks that often lead to workplace injuries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
